message:
fix(session): suppress stale events after /clear

After /clear, events from the dying agent's final turns could leak
into the new session's history array and write stale turn/token data
to the new session's metadata. Add a suppressEvents flag that blocks
event accumulation between /clear and the next submitGoal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
